site.description: Plan shared trips with calendars, plans and real-time collaboration.
footer.createdWith: Built for organizing getaways, routes and bookings from one shared space.
home.title: Organize every trip with guests, plans and clear calendars.
home.description: TravelPlan brings together authentication, shared trips, statuses, categorized plans and calendar views in a lightweight modern experience designed for groups.
home.feature.sharedTrips: Trips with dates, status and location in one panel.
home.feature.flexiblePlans: Plans with category, description, date, time and progress tracking.
home.feature.collaboration: Invite other people with read-only or editor permissions.
home.feature.calendars: Per-trip calendars plus a global view for the full year.
home.highlight.organizedTitle: Keep the whole itinerary under control
home.highlight.organizedDescription: Store ideas, bookings, visits and logistics in editable cards so every trip keeps a clear story from the first idea to the way back home.
home.highlight.collaborativeDescription: Each trip supports invited people with different permissions so you can coordinate with friends, family or a partner without duplicating information.
home.highlight.readyDescription: The interface is built for GitHub Pages and uses Firebase Auth plus Firestore from the client, keeping deployment simple and subpath-safe.
auth.title: Sign in with Google
auth.description: The app uses Google-only authentication for a faster and simpler Firebase sign-in flow.
auth.helper: Press the button to open the Google account chooser and enter your travel dashboard.
auth.passwordHint: Your password must contain at least 6 characters.
auth.signInDescription: Use your Google account to recover trips, accept invitations and keep your calendar in sync.
auth.registerDescription: Start your collaborative dashboard and accept invites for future trips.
auth.success: Signed in. Redirecting to the dashboard.
auth.created: Account created. Redirecting to the dashboard.
auth.providerHint: The Google provider must be enabled in Firebase Authentication.
firebase.configPending: Firebase public environment variables are still missing, so auth and Firestore are not active yet.
firebase.configReady: Firebase is configured and the app can connect.
firebase.permissionDenied: Firestore rejected the read. Review and publish your Firebase project rules.
dashboard.metaDescription: Review your trips, create new itineraries and manage shared invitations.
dashboard.title: Your trips in one dashboard
dashboard.description: Create new getaways, review statuses and accept invitations from a central view with quick access to every trip and calendar.
dashboard.createHint: Trips created here appear in your dashboard and in the global calendar.
dashboard.createError: The trip could not be created.
dashboard.empty: You do not have any trips yet. Create the first one to start shaping your itinerary.
dashboard.invitesEmpty: You do not have any pending invitations right now.
trip.metaDescription: Edit a trip, invite collaborators and add detailed plans.
trip.title: Manage the trip and its plans
trip.description: Update general details, coordinate members and build a categorized plan list so the whole group keeps the same context.
trip.form.name: Trip name
trip.form.helper: Changes are saved in Firestore and visible to invited collaborators.
trip.form.error: The trip could not be saved.
trip.membersEmpty: There are no extra invited people in this trip yet.
trip.invite.helper: You can invite someone even if they have not signed up yet. They will see the invite when they use that email.
trip.invite.error: The invitation could not be sent.
trip.plansHelper: Create a quick plan now and refine it in the detail page later.
trip.plansEmpty: This trip does not have any plans yet.
trip.plansError: The plan could not be created.
trip.missingId: The trip identifier is missing from the URL.
trip.notFound: The requested trip could not be found.
plan.metaDescription: Edit name, description, category, date, time and status for one plan.
plan.title: Fine tune every trip plan
plan.description: Update the content of a plan from a clean detail view built for collaboration.
plan.form.name: Plan name
plan.form.helper: If date or time are empty, the plan remains visible as still unscheduled.
plan.form.error: The plan could not be saved.
plan.missingId: Trip or plan identifiers are missing from the URL.
plan.descriptionEmpty: Add a description to give this plan more context.
plan.location.placeholder: Search for an address, neighborhood or point of interest
plan.location.helper: Search a place, pick it from the results or click directly on the map.
plan.location.initialState: Results will appear here when you search for a location.
plan.location.noneSelected: No location has been assigned to this plan yet.
plan.location.noResults: No results were found for that search.
plan.location.searchError: OpenStreetMap could not be queried right now.
plan.location.emptyQuery: Write a search before querying OpenStreetMap.
calendar.tripMetaDescription: Review trip plans in a monthly calendar view.
calendar.tripDescription: Review how activities are spread across days, find open spaces and track plans that still need a date.
calendar.globalMetaDescription: Visualize plans from all your trips in one monthly view.
calendar.globalDescription: Combine plans from every trip to detect overlaps, busy weeks and your next getaways.
map.metaDescription: Review trip plan locations on a map.
map.title: Plans placed on the map
map.description: Visualize trip points with Leaflet and OpenStreetMap to spot clusters, distances and still-empty areas.
map.empty: This trip does not have any plans with an assigned location yet.
calendar.empty: There are no dated plans in this month.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The route you are looking for does not exist or is not available in this version.
notFound.message: You can go back home or open the dashboard to keep exploring TravelPlan.
